texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · There are total 10 calendar holidays for the year 2026, equally divided into fixed and optional holidays.
texts.text: There are total 10 calendar holidays for the year 2026, equally divided into fixed and optional holidays.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Team Members are requested honour the Fixed Public holidays.
texts.text: Team Members are requested honour the Fixed Public holidays.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Team Members can avail any 5-optional leaves from the list of Optional Public Holiday in the calendar Year 2026.
texts.text: Team Members can avail any 5-optional leaves from the list of Optional Public Holiday in the calendar Year 2026.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Supervisor/ Team leads can use their discretion on the Holidays as per the business exigencies and personal requirement of the TeamMember.
texts.text: Supervisor/ Team leads can use their discretion on the Holidays as per the business exigencies and personal requirement of the TeamMember.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · All the optional holidays can be availed only after the approval is received by the manager on KEKA portal.
texts.text: All the optional holidays can be availed only after the approval is received by the manager on KEKA portal.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Team members are requested to plan leaves and holidays ahead of time so as to avoid situations where leave needs to be compulsorily taken at the end of the year.
texts.text: Team members are requested to plan leaves and holidays ahead of time so as to avoid situations where leave needs to be compulsorily taken at the end of the year.
